source:
# EuroCoin Training Notebook

Minimal OOP training scaffold:
- Stage 1: YOLO detector
- Stage 2: ResNet classifier on cropped detections
- Stage 3: baseline classifier on cropped detections

It is written to work both on a local PC and in Google Drive / Colab, as long as the `eurocoin-vision` project folder exists or `EUROCOIN_VISION_ROOT` is set.

@dataclass(frozen=True)
class YoloTrainerConfig:
    model_name: str = "yolov8n.pt"
    epochs: int = 50
    imgsz: int = 640
    batch: int = 16
    workers: int = 2
    device: str | int = "cuda" if torch.cuda.is_available() else "cpu"
    run_name: str = "stage1_yolo"


class Stage1YoloTrainer:
    def __init__(self, paths: ProjectPaths, config: YoloTrainerConfig | None = None) -> None:
        self._paths = paths
        self._config = config or YoloTrainerConfig()
        self._artifact_resolver = ArtifactResolver()

    def train(self) -> Path:
        data_yaml = self._paths.stage_dataset_dir("stage1") / "data.yaml"
        if not data_yaml.exists():
            raise FileNotFoundError(f"Stage 1 dataset not found: {data_yaml}")

        run_project = self._paths.runs_dir / "stage1"
        run_project.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

        model = YOLO(self._config.model_name)
        model.train(
            data=str(data_yaml),
            project=str(run_project),
            name=self._config.run_name,
            epochs=self._config.epochs,
            imgsz=self._config.imgsz,
            batch=self._config.batch,
            workers=self._config.workers,
            device=self._config.device,
        )

        best_weights = self._artifact_resolver.find_latest_file(run_project, "best.pt")
        print(f"Resolved Stage 1 best weights: {best_weights}")

        publish_dir = self._paths.stage_weight_dir("stage1")
        publish_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        publish_path = publish_dir / f"{self._config.run_name}_best.pt"
        shutil.copy2(best_weights, publish_path)

        data_config = yaml.safe_load(data_yaml.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
        eval_target = data_config.get("test") or data_config.get("val")
        if eval_target is None:
            raise FileNotFoundError(f"Stage 1 dataset yaml has neither 'test' nor 'val': {data_yaml}")
        if data_config.get("test") is None:
            print("Stage 1 dataset has no test split yet. Falling back to val split for final metrics.")

        eval_yaml = data_yaml.parent / "_stage1_eval.yaml"
        eval_config = dict(data_config)
        eval_config["val"] = eval_target
        eval_config["test"] = eval_target
        eval_yaml.write_text(yaml.safe_dump(eval_config, sort_keys=False), encoding="utf-8")

        best_model = YOLO(str(best_weights))
        test_metrics = best_model.val(
            data=str(eval_yaml),
            imgsz=self._config.imgsz,
            batch=self._config.batch,
            device=self._config.device,
        )
        print("Stage 1 test metrics:")
        for metric_name, metric_value in test_metrics.results_dict.items():
            print(f"- {metric_name}: {metric_value}")

        print(f"Stage 1 published to: {publish_path}")
        return publish_path

@dataclass(frozen=True)
class ClassifierTrainerConfig:
    run_name: str
    epochs: int = 5
    batch_size: int = 32
    image_size: int = 224
    learning_rate: float = 1e-3
    num_workers: int = 2
    device: torch.device = torch.device("cuda" if torch.cuda.is_available() else "cpu")


class ImageFolderDataModule:
    def __init__(self, dataset_root: Path, config: ClassifierTrainerConfig) -> None:
        self._dataset_root = dataset_root
        self._config = config
        self.class_names: list[str] = []

    def build_loaders(self) -> tuple[DataLoader, DataLoader, DataLoader, list[str]]:
        imagenet_mean = [0.485, 0.456, 0.406]
        imagenet_std = [0.229, 0.224, 0.225]

        train_transform = transforms.Compose([
            transforms.Resize((self._config.image_size, self._config.image_size)),
            transforms.RandomRotation(
                degrees=360,
                interpolation=transforms.InterpolationMode.BILINEAR,
            ),
            transforms.RandomVerticalFlip(),
            transforms.RandomAffine(
                degrees=0,
                translate=(0.08, 0.08),
                scale=(0.9, 1.1),
                interpolation=transforms.InterpolationMode.BILINEAR,
            ),
            transforms.ColorJitter(
                brightness=0.2,
                contrast=0.2,
                saturation=0.2,
                hue=0.03,
            ),
            transforms.ToTensor(),
            transforms.Normalize(mean=imagenet_mean, std=imagenet_std),
        ])
        val_transform = transforms.Compose([
            transforms.Resize((self._config.image_size, self._config.image_size)),
            transforms.ToTensor(),
            transforms.Normalize(mean=imagenet_mean, std=imagenet_std),
        ])

        train_dir = self._dataset_root / "train"
        val_dir = self._dataset_root / "val"
        test_dir = self._resolve_eval_dir("test", fallback_name="val")

        print(f"Loading classifier dataset from {self._dataset_root}")
        print(f"- train dir: {train_dir}")
        print(f"- val dir: {val_dir}")
        print(f"- test dir: {test_dir}")

        train_dataset = ImageFolder(train_dir, transform=train_transform)
        val_dataset = ImageFolder(val_dir, transform=val_transform)
        test_dataset = ImageFolder(test_dir, transform=val_transform)
        self.class_names = train_dataset.classes

        train_loader = DataLoader(
            train_dataset,
            batch_size=self._config.batch_size,
            shuffle=True,
            num_workers=self._config.num_workers,
        )
        val_loader = DataLoader(
            val_dataset,
            batch_size=self._config.batch_size,
            shuffle=False,
            num_workers=self._config.num_workers,
        )
        test_loader = DataLoader(
            test_dataset,
            batch_size=self._config.batch_size,
            shuffle=False,
            num_workers=self._config.num_workers,
        )
        return train_loader, val_loader, test_loader, self.class_names

    def _resolve_eval_dir(self, split_name: str, fallback_name: str) -> Path:
        split_dir = self._dataset_root / split_name
        if self._has_any_class_images(split_dir):
            return split_dir

        fallback_dir = self._dataset_root / fallback_name
        if self._has_any_class_images(fallback_dir):
            print(
                f"Classifier split '{split_name}' is missing or empty in {self._dataset_root}. "
                f"Falling back to '{fallback_name}'."
            )
            return fallback_dir

        raise FileNotFoundError(
            f"Neither '{split_name}' nor fallback '{fallback_name}' contain class images in {self._dataset_root}"
        )

    def _has_any_class_images(self, root_dir: Path) -> bool:
        if not root_dir.exists():
            return False
        return any(path.is_file() for path in root_dir.rglob("*"))


class TorchvisionClassifierTrainer:
    def __init__(self, paths: ProjectPaths, stage_name: str, config: ClassifierTrainerConfig) -> None:
        self._paths = paths
        self._stage_name = stage_name
        self._config = config
        self._artifact_resolver = ArtifactResolver()

    def fit(self, dataset_root: Path) -> Path:
        print(f"Starting {self._stage_name} classifier training...")
        data_module = ImageFolderDataModule(dataset_root=dataset_root, config=self._config)
        train_loader, val_loader, test_loader, class_names = data_module.build_loaders()
        print(f"- classes: {class_names}")
        print(f"- train samples: {len(train_loader.dataset)}")
        print(f"- val samples: {len(val_loader.dataset)}")
        print(f"- test samples: {len(test_loader.dataset)}")

        model = self._build_model(num_classes=len(class_names)).to(self._config.device)
        criterion = nn.CrossEntropyLoss()
        optimizer = torch.optim.AdamW(model.parameters(), lr=self._config.learning_rate)

        best_accuracy = 0.0
        best_state = copy.deepcopy(model.state_dict())

        for epoch in range(self._config.epochs):
            train_loss = self._train_one_epoch(model, train_loader, criterion, optimizer)
            val_loss, val_accuracy = self._evaluate(model, val_loader, criterion)
            print(
                f"{self._stage_name} | epoch {epoch + 1}/{self._config.epochs} | "
                f"train_loss={train_loss:.4f} | val_loss={val_loss:.4f} | val_acc={val_accuracy:.4f}"
            )

            if val_accuracy >= best_accuracy:
                best_accuracy = val_accuracy
                best_state = copy.deepcopy(model.state_dict())

        model.load_state_dict(best_state)
        print(f"Running final test evaluation for {self._stage_name}...")
        test_loss, test_accuracy = self._evaluate(model, test_loader, criterion)
        print(
            f"{self._stage_name} | test_loss={test_loss:.4f} | test_acc={test_accuracy:.4f}"
        )

        publish_dir = self._paths.stage_weight_dir(self._stage_name)
        publish_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        checkpoint_path = publish_dir / f"{self._config.run_name}_checkpoint.pt"
        torch.save(
            {
                "model_state_dict": best_state,
                "class_names": class_names,
                "image_size": self._config.image_size,
                "best_val_accuracy": best_accuracy,
                "test_accuracy": test_accuracy,
                "test_loss": test_loss,
            },
            checkpoint_path,
        )
        publish_path = self._artifact_resolver.find_latest_file(publish_dir, "*.pt")
        print(f"{self._stage_name} published to: {publish_path}")
        return publish_path

    def _build_model(self, num_classes: int) -> nn.Module:
        model = resnet18(weights=ResNet18_Weights.DEFAULT)
        model.fc = nn.Linear(model.fc.in_features, num_classes)
        return model

    def _train_one_epoch(
        self,
        model: nn.Module,
        loader: DataLoader,
        criterion: nn.Module,
        optimizer: torch.optim.Optimizer,
    ) -> float:
        model.train()
        total_loss = 0.0

        for images, labels in loader:
            images = images.to(self._config.device)
            labels = labels.to(self._config.device)

            optimizer.zero_grad()
            logits = model(images)
            loss = criterion(logits, labels)
            loss.backward()
            optimizer.step()

            total_loss += loss.item() * images.size(0)

        return total_loss / max(1, len(loader.dataset))

    def _evaluate(
        self,
        model: nn.Module,
        loader: DataLoader,
        criterion: nn.Module,
    ) -> tuple[float, float]:
        model.eval()
        total_loss = 0.0
        total_correct = 0
        total_samples = 0

        with torch.no_grad():
            for images, labels in loader:
                images = images.to(self._config.device)
                labels = labels.to(self._config.device)

                logits = model(images)
                loss = criterion(logits, labels)
                predictions = logits.argmax(dim=1)

                total_loss += loss.item() * images.size(0)
                total_correct += (predictions == labels).sum().item()
                total_samples += images.size(0)

        mean_loss = total_loss / max(1, total_samples)
        accuracy = total_correct / max(1, total_samples)
        return mean_loss, accuracy


class Stage2ResNetTrainer(TorchvisionClassifierTrainer):
    def __init__(self, paths: ProjectPaths, config: ClassifierTrainerConfig | None = None) -> None:
        super().__init__(
            paths=paths,
            stage_name="stage2",
            config=config or ClassifierTrainerConfig(run_name="stage2_resnet18"),
        )


MATERIAL_TO_DENOMINATIONS = {
    "bronze": {"1_cent", "2_cent", "5_cent"},
    "gold": {"10_cent", "20_cent", "50_cent"},
    "bicolor": {"1_euro", "2_euro"},
}
DENOMINATION_TO_MATERIAL = {
    denomination_name: material_name
    for material_name, denomination_names in MATERIAL_TO_DENOMINATIONS.items()
    for denomination_name in denomination_names
}


class MaterialGroupedClassificationDatasetBuilder:
    def __init__(self, source_root: Path, output_root: Path) -> None:
        self._source_root = source_root
        self._output_root = output_root

    def build(self) -> dict[str, Path]:
        if self._output_root.exists():
            shutil.rmtree(self._output_root)

        material_roots = {
            material_name: self._output_root / material_name
            for material_name in MATERIAL_TO_DENOMINATIONS
        }

        for material_name, denomination_names in MATERIAL_TO_DENOMINATIONS.items():
            for split_name in ("train", "val", "test"):
                for denomination_name in sorted(denomination_names):
                    (material_roots[material_name] / split_name / denomination_name).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

        for split_name in ("train", "val", "test"):
            split_root = self._source_root / split_name
            if not split_root.exists():
                continue

            for denomination_dir in sorted(path for path in split_root.iterdir() if path.is_dir()):
                denomination_name = denomination_dir.name
                if denomination_name not in DENOMINATION_TO_MATERIAL:
                    raise ValueError(f"Unknown denomination for material grouping: {denomination_name}")

                material_name = DENOMINATION_TO_MATERIAL[denomination_name]
                target_dir = material_roots[material_name] / split_name / denomination_name
                for image_path in sorted(path for path in denomination_dir.iterdir() if path.is_file()):
                    shutil.copy2(image_path, target_dir / image_path.name)

        return material_roots


class Stage3HierarchicalTrainer:
    def __init__(self, paths: ProjectPaths, config: ClassifierTrainerConfig | None = None) -> None:
        self._paths = paths
        self._config = config or ClassifierTrainerConfig(run_name="stage3_resnet18")

    def fit(self, dataset_root: Path) -> Path:
        grouped_roots = MaterialGroupedClassificationDatasetBuilder(
            source_root=dataset_root,
            output_root=self._paths.classification_dir / "stage3_by_material",
        ).build()

        material_artifacts: dict[str, Path] = {}
        for material_name, material_root in grouped_roots.items():
            print(f"Starting Stage 3 material-specific training for {material_name}...")
            trainer = TorchvisionClassifierTrainer(
                paths=self._paths,
                stage_name=f"stage3_{material_name}",
                config=ClassifierTrainerConfig(
                    run_name=f"{self._config.run_name}_{material_name}",
                    epochs=self._config.epochs,
                    batch_size=self._config.batch_size,
                    image_size=self._config.image_size,
                    learning_rate=self._config.learning_rate,
                    num_workers=self._config.num_workers,
                    device=self._config.device,
                ),
            )
            material_artifacts[material_name] = trainer.fit(material_root)

        publish_dir = self._paths.stage_weight_dir("stage3")
        publish_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        manifest_path = publish_dir / f"{self._config.run_name}_hierarchical.yaml"
        manifest_path.write_text(
            yaml.safe_dump(
                {
                    "strategy": "material_first_training",
                    "mapping": {
                        material_name: sorted(denomination_names)
                        for material_name, denomination_names in MATERIAL_TO_DENOMINATIONS.items()
                    },
                    "artifacts": {
                        material_name: str(artifact_path)
                        for material_name, artifact_path in material_artifacts.items()
                    },
                },
                sort_keys=False,
            ),
            encoding="utf-8",
        )
        print(f"Stage 3 hierarchical manifest: {manifest_path}")
        return manifest_path
# Run prepare_datasets.py first so that ml_pipeline/datasets/stage1|stage2|stage3 exist.
